text.title: Account Health Scoring Model Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the per-account scorecard and the weekly dashboard schema.

forbidden.pattern: scorecard with any signal value derived from "I feel like" / opinion-only (no data_source)
scorecard total mismatching sum of signal values
status mismatching the total → status mapping (green 10-12, yellow 5-9, red 0-4)
escalation trigger fired AND action_assigned empty OR deadline > 48h
missing scorecard for an active account in the weekly window
threshold cutoffs modified mid-quarter without quarter-end retro entry

allowed-transformations.transformation: For accounts < 3 months old, signal S6 (sponsor stability) defaults to 1; do not penalize for lack of history.
If an account is in a planned scope-down phase (signed CO), S3 scope creep score uses the new CO baseline, not the original SOW.
Quarterly retro may adjust threshold cutoffs with documented rationale; mid-quarter changes are forbidden by r3.

list.item: scorecard exists for every active account this week
every signal has value + observation + data_source
2-point drops AND 2-week red accounts have escalation triggers recorded
thresholds unchanged since quarter start (or have retro entry)
